reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención. Limpio el lugar. Los aseos también. Detrás hay lugar al aire libre para descansar y hacer picnic para seguir viaje. Siempre hacemos parada allí.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. The place was clean, as were the restrooms. There's an outdoor area behind the restaurant where you can relax and have a picnic before continuing your journey. We always stop there.

reviews.comment:
Pedimos dos café con leche, un asco literal ni gusto a café re aguado!!! Sirvieron de laxante 😆Lo bueno: baños limpios, agua y aire gratis.

(Translated by Google)
We ordered two coffees with milk, they were literally disgusting, they didn't even taste like coffee, they were so watered down!!! They were like a laxative 😆 The good thing: clean bathrooms, free water and air.
